response.title: Healthcare Data Liaison Specialist
response.description: As a Healthcare Data Liaison Specialist at Innovative Health Solutions, you will play a crucial role in bridging the gap between clinical staff, IT teams, and data analysts to optimize data usage for patient care and operational efficiency. You will assist in managing and integrating healthcare data systems while ensuring compliance with healthcare regulations. This is an exciting opportunity to work at the intersection of healthcare delivery and technology, helping to shape the future of patient care through data-driven decisions.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Health Information Management, Data Science, or related field.
